no: Free Yaga-Shura's chained concubine Ehlastra and recruit her as a powerful ToB companion. Install after Ascension.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Free Yaga-Shura's chained concubine and she can join you and become a powerful ally in ToB

co.no: LOCAL FIX APPLIED: STATE_WHICH_SAYS path was wrong. Ehlastra.tp2 line 80 referenced ~wheels/tra/%s/balthadd.tra~ but the correct path is ~wheels/lang/%s/balthadd.tra~. wheels/tra/ only contains schinese/; English tra is at wheels/lang/english/. Patched to use wheels/lang/%s/balthadd.tra. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #15.
